name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
labels: enhancement

## Summary

<!-- One sentence: what do you want Squish to do that it doesn't today? -->

## Motivation

<!-- Why is this useful? What problem does it solve for you? -->

## Proposed solution

<!-- How would you implement this, or what would the user-facing change look like? -->

## Alternatives considered

<!-- What other approaches did you consider and why did you rule them out? -->

## Additional context

<!-- Links, prior art, benchmarks, screenshots, etc. -->
